channel.title: About on Nikolai Shchelkov
channel.description: Recent content in About on Nikolai Shchelkov

item.title: Optimization Project Portfolio for a Railway Company
item.description:
This project presents a framework for building an optimization project portfolio for a railway company based on customer journey mapping, continuous improvement, and cross-functional idea validation.

Download PDF presentation
Project portfolio management case presented as a strategy and implementation deck

📌 Overview

This project focused on designing an optimization project portfolio for a large railway freight company by translating customer pain points into structured improvement initiatives. The portfolio was built on top of customer journey mapping, internal expert input, and a continuous improvement cycle that moved from discovery to idea generation, prioritization, and implementation.

item.title: Startup Financial Model and Scenario Analysis
item.description:
This project presents a reusable Excel-based financial model for startup valuation, scenario planning, and investment analysis.

Download .xlsx file
Built in Microsoft Excel with formulas only, without macros

📌 Overview

This project is a comprehensive Excel financial model built for a startup developing a mobile application for parents. It combines revenue forecasting, expense planning, integrated financial statements, investment efficiency analysis, and dynamic scenario modeling in a single workbook.

item.title: Timber Logistics Stock-on-Hand Forecasting Dashboard
item.description:
This project presents a Power BI dashboard for dynamic short-term stock forecasting across timber transportation phases.

Download .pbix file
Created in Power BI Desktop 2.150.1704.0 64-bit (January 2026)

📌 Overview

This Power BI dashboard supports dynamic stock-on-hand forecasting across timber transportation phases for a large forestry holding company. It helps logistics managers evaluate short-term inventory trends, test how well a linear model fits observed stock dynamics, and estimate when inventory may run out under the currently selected conditions.

item.title: The Port Authority of New York and New Jersey Traffic Dashboard
item.description:
This project presents a Power BI dashboard built on public Port Authority traffic data.

Download .pbix file
Created in Power BI Desktop 2.150.1704.0 64-bit (January 2026)

📌 Overview

This Power BI dashboard analyzes monthly traffic volume and E-ZPass usage across six major Port Authority crossings between New York and New Jersey. It consolidates public monthly reports into a single analytical model and makes it easier to explore long-term trends, facility-level differences, and changes in transponder adoption over time.

item.title: Microsoft Power Platform Fundamentals PL-900 Exam Prep
Unlock Powerful Automation and Analysis with Power Platform
Building AI Agents and Agentic Workflows
Contact
item.description: Feel free to message me using the form below.

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Why Hire Me?

  • 🎯 I deliver results, not just models. My portfolio includes work in #BI reporting, #agenticAI, #ML modeling, #statistical modeling, #financial modeling, #customer journey mapping, and more — but what matters most is that each solution starts with strong business analysis: stakeholder conversations, process discovery, and careful study of existing systems. I do not default to rebuilding from scratch; I improve and extend what already works.
  • 🤝 Reactive or proactive? Both. The voice of the customer is my top priority, but I also bring my own ideas based on prior experience and I am comfortable proposing and defending them. I work through dialogue, not one-way handoffs.
  • 🔍 Transparency is key. I follow an agile approach to development and consistently share interim results to refine requirements, reduce misunderstandings, and keep everyone on the same page throughout the process.
  • 👥 My models work because they are built for people. My endeavor in the U.S. — the one that led to my permanent residency — has been to increase adoption of advanced technologies among non-technical professionals. I do not just build solutions that function; I train users, learn from them, and help organizations create lasting value by strengthening digital skills across teams.
Download Resume PDF

Profile of Achievements in Key Figures

  • 🎓 3 advanced degrees with honors — two STEM degrees and one MBA, with one earned in Russia and two in the United States; currently pursuing a PhD at Florida Atlantic University and inducted into the Phi Kappa Phi Honor Society through the Eastern New Mexico University chapter.
  • 📊 14 years of contributions in data analytics, emerging technologies, and digital skills gap reduction.
  • 🗽 3 years of meaningful contributions in the U.S. across California, New York, and New Mexico, recognized through academic awards and strong support from respected local experts.
  • 🏭 Impact across 4 industries — logistics and transportation, oil and gas, timber, and nonprofit — with models and dashboards used daily by hundreds of peers and stakeholders.
  • 🛠️ 6 core analytical tools and dozens of supporting frameworks implemented, including a candidate nationwide standard for business process notation, portfolio optimization models, customer insight quantification techniques, startup evaluation templates, dynamic reporting systems, and a comprehensive AI implementation framework.
  • 🏆 2 major academic distinctions — one top-level academic award in Russia and one significant award in the United States, both earned in highly competitive environments.
  • 📝 30+ innovative business plans and 250+ grant applications evaluated as an invited expert for national foundations.
  • 📚 7,000+ unique views of published articles on a leading Russian-language blog focused on Power BI and data analytics.
